activities.description: Journey from Hyderabad to Lucknow by Flight. Arrival and proceed to Naimisharanyam.
Check-in and visit the sacred temples of Naimisaranyam.
Participate in Satyanarayana Swami Vratam.
Journey starts towards Varanasi. Arrival and dinner.
Visit Kal Bhairav Temple, Sarnath and Vyasa Kashi.
Visit Birla Mandir, Sankatmochan Hanuman, Tulsi Manas and Durga Mandir.
Early morning journey for Holy bath at Triveni Sangam and sacred rituals.
Visit Bada Hanuman Mandir, Anand Bhawan and Madhaveshwari Temple. Return to Kashi.
Main Darshan at Kashi Vishwanath Temple and leisure time in the holy city.
Journey to Ayodhya. Visit Sri Ram Janmabhoomi, Sarayu River and Hanuman Garhi.
Travel back to Varanasi for overnight stay.
Visit Vindhyavahini Temple.
Visit Sitamarhi Temple and return to Varanasi.
Death ceremony poojas and holy bath at Manikarnika Ghat.
Boat ride visiting 64 ghats and witness the grand Ganga Aarti.
Early morning Abhishekham at Vishwanath Temple.
Visit Lalitha Ghat, Kedar Ghat and Sankata Devi Temple.
Free time for exploring Varanasi markets.
Witness the divine Sapta Rishi Harathi at Vishwanath Temple.
Visit Vishnu Pada Mandir for Pinda Pradhan (Death Ceremony Poojas) and Mangala Gowri Temple.
Visit the Main Bodh Gaya Temple (Mahabodhi Temple).
Breakfast and journey to Patna Airport.
Return journey to Hyderabad by flight.
Journey starts from Hyderabad to Delhi by Flight. Arrival at Delhi and proceed to Amritsar by Bus.
After breakfast visit Golden Temple, Jallianwala Bagh and Durgiana Temple.
Visit Wagah Border for the retreat ceremony.
Breakfast and journey to Katra via Jammu.
Visit the historic Raghunath Mandir in Jammu.
Trek to the holy shrine of Mata Vaishno Devi (12 km Walk, Horse or Doli).
After breakfast, journey starts for Dalhousie.
Visit Khajjiar (India's Mini Switzerland), Panch Pulla, and Satdhara Falls.
Scenic drive to Dharamshala. Check-in and leisure walk to nearby places.
Visit Dalai Lama Temple, Monastry, Cricket Stadium and Tea Gardens.
Journey to Chamunda and check-in.
Visit Chamunda Devi, Jwalamukhi Temple and proceed to Chintapurni.
Visit Naina Devi and proceed to Chandigarh.
Visit Sukhna Lake, Rock Garden and Rose Garden. Journey to Kurukshetra.
Visit Jyotisar, BanGanga and Brahma Sarovar. Journey to Delhi.
Visit the architectural marvel after reaching Delhi.
Visit India Gate, Parliament House, Raj Ghat and Qutub Minar. Flight back home.
Journey from Delhi to Srinagar by Flight. Arrival and transfer to House Boat.
Enjoy a peaceful Shikara ride on the famous Dal Lake. Overnight stay in House Boat.
Visit Shankaracharya temple, Shalimar Gardens and Nishatbagh Gardens.
Visit the Saraswathi Devi temple and relax in the beauty of Srinagar.
Journey to Gulmarg. Visit Ice Point Phase 1 and 2 via the Gandola cable car.
Return to Srinagar for overnight stay.
Journey to the beautiful valley of Pahalgham.
Explore Pahalgham local sightseeing by local taxi or horse. Overnight stay at Pahalgham.
Visit the historic Awantipura Ruins on the way back to Srinagar.
Free time to visit and shop at the famous Lal Chowk market.
Journey to Sonmarg. Visit the stunning glacier by walk, horse or local taxi.
Return journey to Srinagar for final overnight stay.
Transfer to Srinagar Airport for flight to Delhi.
Connected flight from Delhi to Hyderabad.

Visit Manasa Devi and Chandi Devi Temples
Experience the mystical Ganga Aarti at Har Ki Pauri

Darshan at Yamunotri Temple via JanakiChatti (Walk/Doli/Horse)

Journey starts from Hyderabad to Delhi by Flight. Arrival and proceed to Kurukshetra.
Visit Brahma Sarovar, Jyotisar, Bang Ganga, and Kali Matha Temple.
Breakfast and journey to the queen of hills, Shimla.
Check-in at hotel and rest for the night.
Visit Kufri View Point by horse and enjoy the panoramic mountain views.
Proceed towards the scenic valley of Manali.
Visit Ice point (Solang Valley/Gulaba), Hadimba Devi Temple, and Vashisht Temple.
Free time for shopping and exploring the famous Mall Road.
Experience thrilling River Rafting at Kullu (subject to availability).
Journey to the well-planned city of Chandigarh.
Visit Rock Garden, Rose Garden, and Sukhna Lake.
Journey back to the capital city. Check-in and dinner.
Visit Birla Mandir, Parliament House, Rashtrapati Bhavan, India Gate, Rajghat, and Indira Gandhi Museum.
Transfer to Delhi Airport for return flight to Hyderabad.
Pickup from Delhi Airport / Railway station and check-in.
Visit the magnificent Akshardham temple.
Early morning journey to Haridwar.
Visit Manasa Devi Temple and experience the holy Ganga Harathi.
Drive towards Rampur through scenic mountain routes.
Full day dedicated to the holy visit of Kedarnath temple.
Reserved for Kedarnath temple darshan or travel contingency.
Journey starts towards Pipalkot.
Visit Badrinath temple and perform rituals at Brahmakapalam.
Journey back to Pipalkot for overnight stay.
Travel to Rishikesh.
Visit Ram Jhula and Laxman Jhula. Proceed to Haridwar and then to Delhi.
Visit Birla Mandir, Rajghat, India Gate, and see Parliament House & Rashtrapati Bhavan.
Drop at Airport / Railway station for return journey.

activities.description: Arrival at Bangalore and check-in to hotel.
Visit local sightseeing spots and free time for shopping.
Visit the famous hilltop temple.
Visit Mysore Maharaja Palace and Brindavan Gardens.
Explore the architectural wonders of Hoysala temples.
Visit Hornadu Temple and proceed to Kukke Subramanya.
Visit Kukke Subramanya Temple.
Visit Dharmasthala and proceed to Sringeri and then to Udupi.
Visit Udupi Krishna Temple and Mookambika Temple at Kollur.
Visit Murudeshwar Temple and enjoy the beach.
Visit the sacred Mahabaleshwar temple at Gokarna.
Journey to the historic city of Hampi and check-in.
Visit Hampi Ruins, TB Dam and local temples.
Return journey to Hyderabad by bus.
Journey starts from Hyderabad to Kanipakam by Bus. Overnight journey.
Visit Kanipakam Temple and proceed to Sripuram Golden Temple.
Arrive at Tiruvannamalai for check-in and dinner.
Visit Tiruvannamalai Temple and Ramana Maharshi Ashram. Proceed to Chidambaram.
Visit Chidambaram Natarajar Temple and proceed to Kumbakonam for overnight stay.
Visit Kumbakonam Temple and proceed to Srirangam.
Visit Srirangam Ranganathaswamy Temple and Jambukeswaram Temple.
Visit Tanjavur Brihadisvara Temple and proceed to Rameswaram.
Arrival at Rameswaram for check-in and rest.
Spatikalinga Darshanam, Holy bath in ocean and 22 wells bath.
Visit Tiruchendur Murugan Temple and proceed to Kanyakumari.
Experience the beautiful sunrise at the confluence of three oceans.
Visit Kanyakumari Amman Temple and Vivekananda Rock Memorial by ferry.
Visit the world-famous Madurai Meenakshi Temple.
Visit Palani Murugan Temple and proceed to Coimbatore.
Visit Isha Dyanalingam Temple and proceed to Kanchipuram.
Visit Kanchi Kamakshi Temple, Kanchi temples and return journey to Hyderabad.
Journey from Hyderabad. Arrival and transfer to hotel.
Visit the historic Cellular Jail and enjoy the evening Light & Sound Show.
Transfer to Harbour and journey to Havelock Island by Cruise.
Check-in at hotel and visit the world-famous Radhanagar Beach.
Boat trip to Elephant beach for water activities and coral viewing.
Free time for personal activities and exploring the island.
Visit the scenic Kalapathar Beach.
Transfer to harbour and return journey to Portblair by Cruise. Check-in and relax.
Breakfast and transfer to Airport for return flight to Hyderabad.
Journey from Hyderabad to Bagdogra. Meet and proceed towards Gangtok.
Arrival at Gangtok and rest for the night.
Visit Namgyal Institute of Tibetology, Banjakri Falls, Flower Show, Do Drul Chorten Stupa, Enchey Monastery, and Handicrafts Centre.
Free time for shopping at MG Marg (by own transportation).
Journey to and visit the sacred Baba Harbajan Singh Temple.
Visit the high-altitude Tsomgo Lake before returning to the hotel.
Breakfast and scenic journey to Darjeeling.
Check-in and free time for shopping and exploring the Mall Road.
Early morning trip to Tiger Hill for a spectacular sunrise over Kanchenjunga.
Visit Tenzing Rock, Tea Gardens, Tibetan Refuse Centre, Ghum Monastery, Batasia Loop, and Zoological Park.
Visit the beautiful Mirik Lake and enjoy local lunch.
Proceed to Siliguri for your final overnight stay.
Breakfast and drop at Bagdogra Airport for return journey to Hyderabad.
Pickup at Delhi airport/Railway station and transfer to hotel.
Visit the magnificent Akshardham temple. Overnight stay at Delhi.
Full day journey from Delhi to Amritsar.
Check in at Amritsar and enjoy dinner.
Visit Amritsar Local sightseeing including Golden Temple.
Visit Wagah Border ceremony and proceed towards Katra.
Proceed to Katra Vaishno Devi temple Darshan (12 KMS) by Doli, Horse or walk.
Journey starts to Srinagar. Arrival and check in to hotel/houseboat.
Journey to Baltal base camp. Arrival and rest at Base Camp tents.
Visit Amarnath Darshan by Horse or Doli (16 KMS). Night stay at Baltal.
Journey starts back to Srinagar. Enjoy free time for shopping.
Complete Srinagar local sightseeing including Mughal Gardens.
Full day journey towards Chamunda Devi in Himachal Pradesh. Overnight journey.
Visit Chamunda Devi and Kangra Devi temples.
Visit Jwalamukhi temple and proceed to Chintpurni.
Visit Chintpurni temple and Naina Devi temple.
Journey to Kurukshetra for overnight stay.
Visit Kurukshetra local sightseeing spots.
Journey back to Delhi for final overnight stay.
Check out from hotel and drop at Airport/Railway station for departure.

Journey from Hyderabad to Guwahati. Arrival and proceed towards Shillong.
Visit Umium Lake View Point on the way to Shillong. Arrival and rest.
Visit Don Bosco Museum, Wards Lake, Elephant Falls, Golf Course, and Shillong Peak.
Free time for shopping in Shillong (by own transportation).
Journey to Cherrapunjee. Visit Mawkdok Valley and Nohkalikai Falls.
Visit Dainthelen Falls and Ramakrishna Mission. Arrival at hotel and rest.
Half day trek to the unique Double Decker Living Root Bridge.
Visit Seven Sisters Waterfalls, Mawsmai Cave, Khoh Ram Hah, and Eco Park.
Breakfast and journey back to Guwahati.
Visit Vasista Ashram and Kalakshetra. Stay at Guwahati.
Visit the famous Kamakya Devi Temple.
Visit Nabagraha Mandir, Tirupati Balaji Temple, and Sukleswar Temple.
Optional Dinner Cruise on the Brahmaputra River.
Breakfast and drop at Guwahati Airport for return flight to Hyderabad.

Journey starts from Hyderabad to Varanasi by Flight. Arrival and proceed to Hotel.
Check-in and rest at hotel in Kashi.
Visit Kal Bhairav Temple, Sarnath and Vyasa Kashi.
Visit Birla Mandir, Sankatmochan Hanuman, Tulsi Manas, Durga Mandir and Gavallama temple.
Holy bath at Sangam and visit Bada Hanuman Temple.
Visit Anandbhawan and Madhaveshwari Temple. Return to Kashi.
Visit Vindhyavahini temple.
Visit Sitamarhi Temple and return to Varanasi.
Holy Darshan at Kashi Vishwanath Temple and leisure time.
Visit Sri Ram Janmabhoomi, Sarayu river, and Hanuman Mandir.
Return journey for overnight stay in Kashi.
Holy bath at Manikarnika Ghat.
Boat ride visiting 64 Ghats and witness the grand Ganga Harathi.
Journey to Gaya. Visit Vishnu Pada Mandir and Mangala Gowri Temple.
Visit Bodh Gaya main temple and return to Varanasi.
Visit Annapurna Devi, Vishalakshi and Varahi temple.
Witness the divine Sapta Rishi Harathi at the main temple.
Holy bath and final Darshan at Kashi Vishwanath and Annapurna temples.
Transfer to Varanasi Airport for flight back to Hyderabad.
Journey starts from Hyderabad to Jaipur by Flight. Arrival and proceed to Hotel.
After lunch, visit Amber Fort and Jalmahal.
Check out and travel to Deshnok to visit the Karni Mata Temple.
Proceed to Bikaner for check-in and overnight stay.
Visit Junagarh Fort, Laxmi Vilas Palace and Camel Breeding Centre.
Transfer to the Golden City. Arrival and check-in.
Explore Gadi Sagar Lake, Havelis (Salim Singh, Patwon), Bada Bagh and Jaisalmer Fort.
Journey to Sam for desert safari and cultural overnight stay.
Journey to the Blue City.
Visit the magnificent Umaid Bhavan Palace. Free time for shopping.
Visit Mehrangarh Fort and Jaswant Thada.
Drive to the only hill station of Rajasthan. Arrival and rest.
Visit Nakki Lake, Om Shanti Bhavan, Adhar Devi Temple and Dilwara Jain Temple.
Journey to the City of Lakes. Arrival and overnight stay.
Visit City Palace, Jagdish Mandir, Maharana Pratap Smarak, Fateh Sagar Lake, and Saheliyon-ki-Bari.
Final exploration of Udaipur then proceed to Nathdwara.
Darshan at Shrinathji Temple (Nathdwara).
Visit Dwarkadhish Temple at Kankroli and proceed to Pushkar.
Arrival Pushkar, check-in and rest.
Visit City Palace, Jantar Mantar, Hawa Mahal and Birla Mandir in Jaipur.
Transfer to Jaipur Airport for return flight to Hyderabad.
Journey from Hyderabad to Varanasi by Flight. Arrival and proceed to Hotel check-in.
Check in Hotel and rest for the day.
Journey to Allahabad. Visit Prayaga Triveni Sangam, perform sacred rituals and Ganga Pooja.
Visit Bada Hanuman Temple, Anand bhawan and Madhaveshwari Temple. Return to Kashi for overnight stay.
Visit Kal Bhairav temple, Sarnath and Vyasa Kashi.
Visit Birla Mandir, Sankatmochan Hanuman mandir, Tulsi manasa mandir, Durga mandir and Gavallama temple.
Holy bath in Ganga River and Visit Kashi Viswanath temple, Annapurna Devi Temple and Vishalakshi temple.
Final lunch and drop at Varanasi Airport/Railway station for return journey.
Journey starts from Hyderabad to Patna by Flight. Arrival and hotel check-in.

Visit Janaki Mandir, Ram Sita Vivah Mandap, and Ganga Sagar.

Darshan at the sacred Mukthinath Temple. Return to Jomsom.
Return flight to Pokhara.
Visit Brindvasini Temple, Devis Falls, Guptheshwar Mahadev, and Varahi Temple.
Rest or optional activities (for flight delays/contingency).

Visit Buda Neelakanta, Swayambhunath temple, and Gruheswari Matha Mandir.
Journey back towards the Indian border.
Visit Maya Devi Temple (Birthplace of Buddha).

Visit Chakra Tirtha and other temples in Naimisharanyam.
Proceed to Kashi for overnight stay.

Visit Trimbakeshwar Jyotirlinga temple.

Enjoy a delicious dinner and relax at the hotel.
Visit Fort Aguada, the historic Light House, and Seqerium Beach.
Enjoy lunch and have free time for personal activities or exploring local areas.
